check_fast_log.name: sext_diff_i1_xor_sub_1
check_fast_log.body:
define i64 @sext_diff_i1_xor_sub_1(i64 %a, i1 %b, i1 %c) {
; CHECK-LABEL: define i64 @sext_diff_i1_xor_sub_1(
; CHECK-SAME: i64 [[A:%.*]], i1 [[B:%.*]], i1 [[C:%.*]]) {
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[D:%.*]] = sext i1 [[B]] to i64
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[E_NEG:%.*]] = zext i1 [[C]] to i64
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = add nsw i64 [[E_NEG]], [[D]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i64 [[R]]
  %d = sext i1 %b to i64
  %e = sext i1 %c to i64
  %f = xor i64 %d, %a
  %r = sub i64 %d, %e
  ret i64 %r
}

alive2.src:
define i64 @sext_diff_i1_xor_sub_1(i64 %a, i1 %b, i1 %c) {
; CHECK-LABEL: define i64 @sext_diff_i1_xor_sub_1(
; CHECK-SAME: i64 [[A:%.*]], i1 [[B:%.*]], i1 [[C:%.*]]) {
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[D:%.*]] = sext i1 [[B]] to i64
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[E_NEG:%.*]] = zext i1 [[C]] to i64
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = add nsw i64 [[E_NEG]], [[D]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i64 [[R]]
  %d = sext i1 %b to i64
  %e = sext i1 %c to i64
  %f = xor i64 %d, %a
  %r = sub i64 %d, %e
  ret i64 %r
}
alive2.tgt:
; ModuleID = '<stdin>'
source_filename = "<stdin>"

define i64 @sext_diff_i1_xor_sub_1(i64 %a, i1 %b, i1 %c) {
  %d = sext i1 %b to i64
  %e.neg = zext i1 %c to i64
  %r = add nsw i64 %e.neg, %d
  ret i64 %r
}
alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i64 @sext_diff_i1_xor_sub_1(i64 %a, i1 %b, i1 %c) {
#0:
  %d = sext i1 %b to i64
  %e = sext i1 %c to i64
  %r = sub i64 %d, %e
  ret i64 %r
}
=>
define i64 @sext_diff_i1_xor_sub_1(i64 %a, i1 %b, i1 %c) {
#0:
  %d = sext i1 %b to i64
  %e.neg = zext i1 %c to i64
  %r = add nsw i64 %e.neg, %d
  ret i64 %r
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

define i64 @sext_diff_i1_xor_sub_1(i64 %a, i1 %b, i1 %c) {
; CHECK-LABEL: define i64 @sext_diff_i1_xor_sub_1(
; CHECK-SAME: i64 [[A:%.*]], i1 [[B:%.*]], i1 [[C:%.*]]) {
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[D:%.*]] = sext i1 [[B]] to i64
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[E_NEG:%.*]] = zext i1 [[C]] to i64
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = add nsw i64 [[E_NEG]], [[D]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i64 [[R]]
  %d = sext i1 %b to i64
  %e = sext i1 %c to i64
  %f = xor i64 %d, %a
  %r = sub i64 %d, %e
  ret i64 %r
}

define i64 @sext_diff_i1_xor_sub_1(i64 %a, i1 %b, i1 %c) {
  %d = sext i1 %b to i64
  %e.neg = zext i1 %c to i64
  %r = add nsw i64 %e.neg, %d
  ret i64 %r
}
